case_title: KALAVERAS, PAUL vs. CLOSETS AND MORE 'DESIGNS BY PAT TAFFER'

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KALAVERAS, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CLOSETS AND MORE 'DESIGNS BY PAT TAFFER'
